title: Bloomberg This Weekend 2/28/2026
description: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity and context to this weekend's biggest news, US and Israel's attack on Iran, LIVE from New York. Joined by Beacon Global Strategies Managing Director & Partner Michael Allen, International Security Assistance Force Gen. John Allen (Ret.), Rep. Jake Auchincloss,Gen. Mark Kimmitt (Ret.), Former US Ambassador to UN John Bolton, Director & Senior Adviser at Center for Strategic  & Intl Studies Middle East Program Mona Yacoubian (Source: Bloomberg)
